mapper.select:
SELECT algorithm_version_id AS algorithmVersionId, version_no AS versionNo, implementation_key AS implementationKey, description AS description, policy_config AS policyConfig, is_active AS isActive FROM algorithm_version WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( version_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR implementation_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND is_active = #{isActive}
ORDER BY algorithm_version_id DESC

SELECT algorithm_version_id AS algorithmVersionId, version_no AS versionNo, implementation_key AS implementationKey, description AS description, policy_config AS policyConfig, is_active AS isActive, created_at AS createdAt, created_by AS createdBy, updated_at AS updatedAt, updated_by AS updatedBy FROM algorithm_version WHERE algorithm_version_id = #{algorithmVersionId}
